headerSubtitle: Income Tax Campaign 2025 · Personal Income Tax (IRPF)
instructionsText: Please fill in this questionnaire as accurately as possible. The information provided will allow us to prepare your tax file for the
instructionsText2: . All data will be treated in strict confidence in accordance with data protection regulations.
docsInfoText: PDF, JPG or PNG files are accepted. Maximum file size: 5 MB.
docAdicional: Additional documentation (Pay slips, withholding certificates, deductible invoices, etc.)
commentsPlaceholder: Please describe any special situation to be taken into account: property sales, foreign investments, changes in marital status, inheritances, etc.
confirmClear: Are you sure you want to clear all fields?
toastErrorNetwork: ❌ Could not connect to the server. Please check your connection and try again.
successText: We have received your information. Our team will review your tax file and contact you shortly.
footerDisclaimer: This form is for informational purposes only and does not constitute an official submission to NH Gestión Integral.
footerAgency: Tax Agency · www.agenciatributaria.es · 2025 Income Tax Campaign

errUserBlocked: Your account is blocked. Please contact the administrator.

errNewPasswordLength: New password must be at least
buscarRentaDesc: Enter your tracking code to check the status of your file.
tokenDesc: Save this code to check the status of your questionnaire at any time.
tokenConsultaDesc: Enter the tracking code you received when submitting the form to check the status of your file.

footerStep1Text: Access with your DNI/NIE and password to manage your tax questionnaires securely. If you do not have an account yet, contact the administrator.
footerStep2Text: Complete the form with your personal details, housing situation, family dependants and income. You can attach the required documents (ID, pay slips, etc.).
footerStep3Text: Once submitted, you will receive a unique tracking code. Keep it to check the status of your file at any time.
footerStep4Text: From your profile you can check the status of your file: received, under review, pending documentation or completed.
footerStep5Text: If you have any questions or need help, use the contact form and our team will reply as soon as possible.
footerContactMessagePlaceholder: Describe your query or problem in as much detail as possible…
footerContactSuccess: ✅ Message sent successfully. We will get back to you shortly.
footerContactError: ❌ Could not send message. Please try again.
footerContactErrEmail: Please enter a valid email address
footerContactErrMessage: Message must be at least 10 characters

errValidationQuestions: ❌ Please answer all questions before submitting the form.
